title: Disable OpenCode Markdown Table Formatter Plugin
summary: Safely disable @franlol/opencode-md-table-formatter@0.0.3 from the active global OpenCode plugin array, validate config parsing, update reference docs, and preserve rollback.
keyOutcomes: Markdown table formatter plugin no longer loads at OpenCode startup
Global opencode.jsonc backup exists before the edit
OpenCode config parses after the edit
Reference documentation reflects six active plugins
risks: JSONC syntax corruption during manual edit
validationCriteria: Target plugin string absent from active opencode.jsonc
opencode debug config returns no parse errors
docs/reference/opencode-configuration.md no longer lists md-table-formatter as active
Rollback backup exists and contains original plugin string
